STM32G474

This package provides interrupts part of the vector table. It uses
following external symbols to construct vector table:

  WWDG_Handler
  PVD_PVM_Handler
  RTC_TAMP_CSS_LSE_Handler
  RTC_WKUP_Handler
  FLASH_Handler
  RCC_Handler
  EXTI0_Handler

  DMA1_CH5_Handler
  DMA1_CH6_Handler

  USB_LP_Handler
  FDCAN1_IT0_Handler
  FDCAN1_IT1_Handler

  TIM1_BRK_TIM15_Handler
